goal: Fix Open HTML single-file rendering by resolving shared HTML files to local render HTML text before Base64/Safari handoff, while preserving ZIP/folder bundling and here.now guidance.
notes: Working on main with an already dirty worktree. Preserve unrelated changes. The previous direct base64Encode(ShortcutInput) single-file path completed silently on-device, so this pass replaces it with a visible preflight and getText-based render string path for normal UTF-8 HTML.
